title: Custom Capes Client
description: Changes a users cape from the default Minecraft capes to my custom capes which can be changed on my website
body:
# 🌌 Welcome to the Dreamcraft Network Custom Capes Client

Elevate your Minecraft experience with custom capes! Our mod makes it incredibly simple to showcase your style in-game. Follow the quick steps below to get started.

### 🚀 Getting Started

**Step 1: Download the Mod**
[Click here to download the latest version of the Dreamcraft Capes Mod]

**Step 2: Account Registration**
Head over to the [Dreamcraft Network Portal](https://cape.dreamcraftnetwork.com/register) to create your account. Once registered, link your Minecraft username to ensure your cape displays correctly in-game.

**Step 3: Choose Your Look**
Personalize your character by visiting our galleries:
* **[Browse the Gallery](https://cape.dreamcraftnetwork.com/gallery):** Pick from our curated selection of stunning capes.
* **[Create Your Own](https://cape.dreamcraftnetwork.com/create):** Use our design tool to build a unique cape that represents you.

**Step 4: Launch & Play**
Open your Minecraft launcher, load the game, and jump into a server. Your custom cape will automatically appear on your character.

---
*Need help or have questions? Reach out to the Dreamcraft support team for assistance on [Discord](https://discord.gg/HAkhteYMAd)*
